minecraft:scatter_feature.iterations: t.threshold = math.random(4, 5); t.bounds_x = 12; t.bounds_z = 12; t.bounds_y = 12;  t.bounds_x_half = t.bounds_x / 2; t.bounds_z_half = t.bounds_z / 2; t.bounds_y_half = t.bounds_y / 2; t.radius_min = 1.2; t.radius_max = 2.2; t.influence_min = 4; t.influence_max = 5; t.contentbox_x_positive = t.bounds_x_half - t.radius_max; t.contentbox_x_negative = -t.contentbox_x_positive; t.contentbox_z_positive = t.bounds_z_half - t.radius_max; t.contentbox_z_negative = -t.contentbox_z_positive; t.contentbox_y_positive = t.bounds_y_half - t.radius_max;  t.contentbox_y_negative = -t.contentbox_y_positive; t.point1_center_x = 1; t.point1_center_z = 1; t.point1_center_y = 1; t.point1_radius = 1; t.point1_influence = 1; t.point2_center_x = math.random(t.contentbox_x_negative, t.contentbox_x_positive); t.point2_center_z = math.random(t.contentbox_z_negative, t.contentbox_z_positive); t.point2_center_y = math.random(t.contentbox_y_negative, t.contentbox_y_positive); t.point2_radius = math.random(t.radius_min, t.radius_max); t.point2_influence = math.random(t.influence_min, t.influence_max); t.point3_center_x = math.random(t.contentbox_x_negative, t.contentbox_x_positive); t.point3_center_z = math.random(t.contentbox_z_negative, t.contentbox_z_positive);  t.point3_center_y = math.random(t.contentbox_y_negative, t.contentbox_y_positive);  t.point3_radius = math.random(t.radius_min, t.radius_max); t.point3_influence = math.random(t.influence_min, t.influence_max); t.point4_center_x = math.random(t.contentbox_x_negative, t.contentbox_x_positive); t.point4_center_z = math.random(t.contentbox_z_negative, t.contentbox_z_positive); t.point4_center_y = math.random(t.contentbox_y_negative, t.contentbox_y_positive); t.point4_radius = math.random(t.radius_min, t.radius_max); t.point4_influence = math.random(t.influence_min, t.influence_max); t.center_x = v.originx; t.center_z = v.originz; t.center_y = v.originy; return 1;
